articles.description: George Russell takes a comfortable victory in the Australian Grand Prix at the start of a new F1 era after an early scrap with Charles Leclerc.
articles.title: Australian Grand Prix result: George Russell wins from Kimi Antonelli as new era F1 era begins

articles.description: England's defeat by Italy has turned the spotlight on England's leadership, both on and off the pitch
articles.title: Steve Borthwick: Is Italy defeat the beginning of the end for England coach?

articles.description: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe admits his side were taught a tough lesson in their 3-1 FA Cup fifth-round defeat by Manchester City.
articles.title: Newcastle 1-3 Man City: FA Cup gives Magpies tough reminder of gap to top

articles.description: Scotland deliver arguably their best performance in almost 40 years to give themselves unlikely shot at Six Nations title.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: 'Fantastic French made to look ordinary as Scotland come of age'

articles.description: New Zealand bowler Brett Randell becomes the first bowler in the 254-year history of first-class cricket to take five wickets in five balls.
articles.title: New Zealand bowler makes first-class cricket history with five wickets in five balls

articles.description: As corner kicks continue to cause chaos in the Premier League, BBC Sport take a closer at why they are becoming so hard to defend.
articles.title: The anatomy of a corner-kick: how set-piece analysis is reshaping the Premier League

articles.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander moves to within two games of breaking a decades-old NBA record as the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Golden State Warriors.
articles.title: NBA: Oklahoma City Thunder 104-97 Golden State Warriors: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander closes on Wilt Chamberlain record

articles.description: BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the Australian Grand Prix.
articles.title: Australian Grand Prix driver ratings: Harry Benjamin on how grid performed in Melbourne

articles.description: Manchester United set their sights on one of Bournemouth's star players, while Unai Emery could be on his way out at Aston Villa and Newcastle United need to target a new shot-stopper.
articles.title: Football gossip: Marcus Tavernier, Unai Emery, Pep Guardiola, Edu, Bernardo Silva, Jurgen Klopp

articles.description: A back injury sees Rory McIlroy withdraw from the Arnold Palmer Invitational in Orlando before the third round.
articles.title: Rory McIlroy withdraws from Arnold Palmer Invitational with back injury
